zh.lifeSummary: Geva d'Avranches是Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester和N.N. various mistresses的女兒，於大約1078年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特。她於1096年與Geoffrey Ridel在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德普雷斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1145年在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Geva d'Avranches是Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester和N.N. various mistresses的女儿，于大约1078年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特。她于1096年与Geoffrey Ridel在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德普雷斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1145年在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Geva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Geva d'Avranches was born about 1078, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester and N.N. various mistresses. She married Geoffrey Ridel in 1096, in Preston, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1145, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Geva d'Avranches est née environ 1078, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester et N.N. various mistresses. Elle a épousé Geoffrey Ridel en 1096, à Preston, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1145, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Geva d'Avranches wurde um 1078 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester und N.N. various mistresses geboren. Sie hat 1096 in Preston, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Geoffrey Ridel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1145 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Geva d'Avranches è nata il circa 1078 nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester e N.N. various mistresses. Lei sposato Geoffrey Ridel nel 1096, nel Preston, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1145, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geva d'Avranchesは約1078年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットでHugh d'Avranches, Earl of ChesterとN.N. various mistressesの娘として生まれた。1096年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドプレストンでGeoffrey Ridelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1145年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geva d'Avranches(은)는 대략 1078년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester(와)과 N.N. various mistresses의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1096년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 플레스턴에서 Geoffrey Ridel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1145년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Geva d'Avranches nasceu aproximadamente 1078, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester e N.N. various mistresses. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey Ridel em 1096, em Preston, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1145, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Geva d'Avranches родилась около 1078 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Hugh d'Avranches, Earl of Chester и N.N. various mistresses. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey Ridel в 1096 г. в местности престон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1145 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

Se casó con Geoffrey Ridel en 1096, en Preston, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
